id.description: A UUID string identifying this live debugger session.

kind.description:
Entry kind: note, event_highlight, or conclusion.

* `note` - note
* `event_highlight` - event_highlight
* `conclusion` - conclusion

payload.description: Payload shape depends on kind. note/conclusion: {markdown: str}. event_highlight: {event_uuids: list[str], caption: str}.
